meta.title: DEF CON Safe Mode AppSec Village - Fredrick “Flee” Lee  -  What Bruce Lee Can Teach Us About AppSec
meta.description: Every few years, security “thought leaders” tell us what is the one, proper way to practice application security. I’m just as guilty of this as anyone else in the “industry”. But, it turns out there isn’t just one true style of effective AppSec. This talk walks through my path of letting go of dogma, finding my style, and returning back to always being a student of the game. “Absorb what is useful, reject what is useless, add what is essentially your own.”
